name: Old Fashioned Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, mix together vinegar and mustard.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients (water, brown sugar, and eggs) and bring to a slow boil while stirring constantly.
3. Cook and stir until the mustard thickens, about 10 minutes.
Yield: About 12 ounces.
Note: Homemade mustards must be stored in the refrigerator.
